headline: Leon Draisaitl is scoring 68% above expectations
body: Leon Draisaitl has scored 63 goals against an expected 37.4 this season (+25.6 goals above expected). Historical data suggests deviations this large tend to normalize.
social_text: Leon Draisaitl is scoring at 1.68x expected (+25.6 GAx). History says this won't last.

headlines.title: Oilers’ Draisaitl visits doctor in Germany for injury
